threats.title: Malicious JetBrains Plugins Steal AI API Keys as Chrome Extensions Capture Chatbot Chats
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a "coordinated malware campaign" on the JetBrains Marketplace that has published no less than 15 malicious plugins capable of exfiltrating artificial intelligence (AI) provider keys. threats.title: 144 Mastra npm Packages Compromised via Hijacked Contributor Account
threats.summary: As many as 144 npm packages associated with the Mastra namespace ("@mastra/*"), a popular open-source JavaScript and TypeScript framework for building artificial intelligence (AI) applications, have been compromised as part of a software supply chain attack codenamed easy-day-js, per findings from JFrog, SafeDep, Socket, and StepSecurity.
